title: AI outperforms conventional diagnosis for certain types of heart attacks: Study
description: An artificial intelligence (AI)-based method for interpreting ECGs performed better than standard approaches in detecting occlusive myocardial infarction (MI), according to a study presented at ESC Acute CardioVascular Care 2026, the annual congress of the Association for Acute CardioVascular Care (ACVC), a branch of the European Society of Cardiology (ESC).
content: Sophia Antipolis [France], March 20 (ANI): An artificial intelligence (AI)-based method for interpreting ECGs performed better than standard approaches in detecting occlusive myocardial infarction (MI), according to a study presented at ESC Acute Car... [3164 chars]

title: Russia to give itself sweeping powers to ban or restrict foreign AI tools
description: Russia is set to introduce new rules for artificial intelligence. Foreign AI tools may face bans or restrictions if they fail to comply. These regulations aim to protect citizens and promote domestic AI development. The new regime will likely come into effect next year. Russian user data will need to be stored locally for compliance.
content:

title: MAGA has been swooning over a beautiful Army soldier and her pro-Trump message. She is AI
description: The account is an example of how artificial intelligence is being used to push political agendas in wartime
content:

title: Unifying AI: The White House's National Framework
description: The White House announced a new artificial intelligence policy to create a unified national framework, focusing on children's safety and reducing energy costs. The plan seeks to bypass disparate state laws, encourage innovation, and fortify national security while aiming to maintain the U.S. lead in technology.
content: The White House has introduced a comprehensive artificial intelligence policy designed to unify AI governance across the nation. Released on Friday, the policy emphasizes protecting children's online safety and cutting down on prohibitive energy cost... [744 chars]

title: Laffont’s $70 Billion Coatue Looks to Launch New AI, Tech Fund
description: Philippe Laffont’s $70 billion Coatue Management is gearing up to launch a new fund to wager on public and private artificial intelligence and tech innovation companies, a sign the firm is rethinking its long-only investing strategy as more startups stay private for longer.

title: White House releases AI policy framework for Congress, with six guiding principles
description: The White House is laying out a new framework that it wants Congress to use to shape national rules for artificial intelligence. On Friday, it released a blueprint with six guiding principles. The plan focuses on protecting children and empowering parents. It also stresses public safety and stronger communities. The White House calls for respect for intellectual property and protections for free speech. It also pushes innovation, American leadership in AI, and workforce training. The administration says strong federal leadership builds public trust. The release comes as lawmakers and advocacy groups are pressing for tighter AI oversight.
content:
WASHINGTON (AP) — The White House on Friday released its framework for how it wishes Congress will address the issue of artificial intelligence.
The legislative blueprint, released on its website, outlines a half-dozen guiding principles for lawmaker... [404 chars]

title: White House Unveils AI Policy Framework for Congress
description: The White House has released a framework outlining key principles for Congress to address artificial intelligence. It focuses on protecting children, communities, intellectual property, free speech, innovation, and developing an AI-ready workforce. Strong federal leadership is emphasized to ensure trustworthy AI use, with calls for regulation to prevent misuse.
